MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON JUN-14-2017 IN DEPT. 206, PETITIONER/APPLICANT DEMARCO BROWN'S APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS IS TO JUN-21-2017, 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 206 FOR APPLICANT TO FILE AN AMENDED APPLICATION TO PROVIDE MORE INFORMATION FOR THE COURT. JUDGE: TERI L. JACKSON; CLERK: D. LOK; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PETITIONER BROWN, DEMARCO EVERETT HEARING SET FOR JUN-14-2017 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JUN-21-2017 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PETITIONER DEMARCO BROWN'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: NEWTON LAM; CLERK: JIROQUE; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

NAME CHANGE CALENDAR OF AUG-01-2017, NAME CHANGE CALENDAR GRANTED PER WRITTEN ORDER. PETITIONER PRESENT IN COURT. PROOF OF PUBLICATION ON FILE. HEARING FOR OSC FOR CHANGE OF NAME NOT REQUIRED. JUDGE: LESLIE C. NICHOLS, CLERK: A. MOK AND M. GRIER. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. (514)
